allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\scop\\.claude\\skills" -Recurse -Filter "SKILL.md" | Sort-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "--- $\($_.FullName\)"; Get-Content $_.FullName -Encoding UTF8 -TotalCount 1 | Select-Object -First 1 | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(80, $_.Length\)\) + "..." } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content | Select-String "root" } catch { Write-Output "Error: $_" })
